notes: Store API keys here OR set env_var names that resolve at runtime.
Do NOT commit real keys. File mode should be 600.
Subscription OAuth: use isolated config_dir per account (Claude Code profile isolation).
usage_percent is user-maintained (or set via `effi accounts meter`). Auto APIs vary by plan.

accounts.label: Personal Max (OAuth profile)
accounts.notes: Copy/isolate Claude credentials into config_dir; effi sets CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR when activating.
